scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev:backend" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health && npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && rm -rf dist && cp -r frontend/dist ./dist
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
